accurate.why: All factual claims are consistent with the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves a specific DOL rule and nullifies it.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule shall have no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions exist in this resolution.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the sole operative provision accurately.

concise.why: Includes procedural passage details (dates, Senate receipt) and some redundant framing that adds unnecessary length.

correct_entities.why: Department of Labor and rule title correctly named.

correct_figures.why: Fed. Reg. citation and dates are correct.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
